message:
chore: expand .gitignore with profiling, benchmark, and scratch patterns

Add patterns for perf.data, profraw, flamegraph SVGs, benchmark JSON
baselines, SQLite scratch DBs, beads history snapshots, build artifacts,
and bv graph export files to prevent ephemeral artifacts from polluting
the working tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,3 +8,23 @@ Cargo.lock
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Profiling and benchmark data
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+*.profraw
+flamegraph*.svg
+scripts/perf_baseline.json
+
+# Local scratch DBs
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
+# Build artifacts
+a.out
+
+# Beads history snapshots
+.beads/.br_history/
+
+# bv graph output
+--graph-format.svg
